title: caruelina oligantha
intro: Caruelina oligantha, also known as the "Five-angled tristicha", is a tropical plant species native to Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, derived from its saponins and flavonoids content. The health benefits of Caruelina oligantha include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically used, often dried and made into teas or infusions, to leverage its medicinal properties.
